code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let t = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
        if tok == t
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  print("count=#{count}")
end
